state.history_summary:
assistant: Hi! How can I help you today?
user: The user wants to modify reservation HXDUBJ by moving both flights, upgrading to business class, and adding two checked bags.
assistant: The assistant retrieves the reservation and searches matching flight options.
user: The user selects outbound HAT072 and return HAT278 and asks about fees.
assistant: The assistant estimates extra costs and asks for membership confirmation.
user: The user says they have insurance and believes that should waive change fees and fare differences.
assistant: The assistant explains the visible policy does not support waiving all modification costs and asks whether the user will proceed or provide membership details.
user: The user insists the website says insurance should waive all extra costs and asks for the matter to be double-checked or escalated.
assistant: The assistant transfers the conversation to a human agent.
tool: Transfer successful.
assistant: The assistant tells the user they are being transferred to a human agent.

candidate_answers.text: You’re now being connected to a human agent for further help with the policy dispute.
The transfer has already been completed before this user transfer marker appears, so there is no further airline-system action to take.

provenance.source_type: manual annotation from real tau2 episode
provenance.decision_rule: Use the literal transfer marker because it is the real final user turn after the escalation has already been executed, making stop the only grounded action.
provenance.scoring_method: Manual one-step proxy scoring from the decision-point state. Scores reflect which action most directly advances the user's request using only visible conversation evidence.
notes: query comes directly from the selected user message and is the transfer sentinel
history_summary stops before any hypothetical human-agent follow-up
candidate_answers are manual non-leaky drafts grounded only in visible context
special case: post-transfer sentinel, so transfer_to_human_agents is no longer the best action and stop wins
